# Character & Emoji Policy

## Permitted Emojis — Exhaustive List

**No emoji or non-ASCII character may be used unless listed below.**

### Log Levels

| Level | Emoji | Rule |
|-------|-------|------|
| FATAL | 💥 | Irrecoverable crash/shutdown |
| ERROR | ❌ | Blocking failure |
| WARN | ⚠️ | Non-blocking awareness |
| INFO | *(none)* | Plain text only |
| DEBUG | *(none)* | Plain text only |
| TRACE | *(none)* | Plain text only |

### Status Indicators

| Purpose | Symbol |
|---------|--------|
| Success | ✅ |
| Info | ℹ️ |
| Bug | 🐞 |
| Pending | ⏳ |
| Cancelled | 🚫 |
| Test pass | 🟢 |
| Test fail | 🔴 |
| Security | 🔒 |
| Performance | ⚡ |

### Workflow

| Purpose | Symbol |
|---------|--------|
| Step | ➤ |
| Next | ➔ |
| Done | ✔ |
| Blocked | ⛔ |
| Retry | 🔁 |

### ASCII Box Drawing & Arrows (terminal-safe)

`─ │ ┌ ┐ └ ┘ ├ ┤ ┬ ┴ ┼ ➤ ➔ → ✔ ✖ ▲ ▼`

## Log Files — ASCII Only

⚠️ **Persistent log output (files, streams, archives) must be pure ASCII.** Strip all emojis and Unicode, even those permitted above. Console, docs, prompts may use permitted symbols.

## Usage Rules

- ONE emoji per section/heading maximum
- Use sparingly — only when it adds clarity
- Prefer plain text for status in most contexts
- No repetitive emoji on list items

| ❌ Don't | ✅ Do | Why |
|----------|-------|-----|
| `- Task 1 ✅`<br>`- Task 2 ✅`<br>`- Task 3 ✅` | `## Phase 1 Complete`<br>`- Task 1`<br>`- Task 2`<br>`- Task 3` | Excessive repetition adds noise |
| Use unlisted Unicode/emoji | Use only symbols from this doc | Strict allowlist enforced everywhere |
| Emoji in log files | Plain ASCII in all logged data | Log shipper/parser compatibility |

**STRICT:** No characters outside this approved list in code, comments, docs, console output, or LLM prompts.
